chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-542 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 09.03.2021 Mr. Mushtaque Ali Tagar advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. Mr. Badaruddin Khoso advocate files power and statement dated 09.03.2021 on behalf of respondents 2 and 3, which are taken on record. According to the above statement, all outstanding dues have been received by the petitioner. In view of the above, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition may be disposed of. By consent, the petition, having served its purpose, stands disposed of with no order as to costs. J U D G E J U D G E Ali Haider
